sentences.target: In unserer Region ist es heute kalt.
sentences.reading: /ɪn ˈʊn.zəʁɐ ʁeˈɡi̯oːn ɪst ɛs ˈhɔʏ̯tə kalt/

translations.de: In unserer Region ist es heute kalt.
translations.ipa: /ɪn ˈʊn.zəʁɐ ʁeˈɡi̯oːn ɪst ɛs ˈhɔʏ̯tə kalt/
translations.en: In our region, it’s cold today.
translations.es: Hoy hace frío en nuestra región.
translations.fr: Il fait froid dans notre région aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi fa freddo nella nostra regione.
translations.pt: Hoje está frio na nossa região.
translations.vi: Hôm nay ở khu vực của chúng tôi trời lạnh.
translations.nl: Het is vandaag koud in onze regio.
translations.hu: Ma hideg van a mi régiónkban.
translations.hi: आज हमारे इलाके में ठंड है.
translations.pl: Dziś jest zimno w naszym regionie.
translations.el: Σήμερα κάνει κρύο στην περιοχή μας.
translations.nb: I dag er det kaldt i regionen vår.
translations.id: Hari ini dingin di wilayah kami.
translations.sv: I dag är det kallt i vår region.
translations.ro: Astăzi este frig în regiunea noastră.
translations.cs: Dnes je v našem regionu zima.
translations.da: I dag er der koldt i vores region.
translations.ja: 今日はこの地域は寒いです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition marking static location; governs dative.
Possessive determiner in dative feminine singular, agreeing with 'Region'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the prepositional phrase complement of 'In'.
Copula (3rd person singular present) linking the subject 'es' to the predicative adjective 'kalt'.
Pronoun in nominative; dummy/formal subject in a weather statement.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement.

sentences.target: Ich ziehe bald in eine andere Region.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈtsiːə balt ɪn ˈaɪ̯nə ˈandəʁə ʁeˈɡi̯oːn/

translations.de: Ich ziehe bald in eine andere Region.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈtsiːə balt ɪn ˈaɪ̯nə ˈandəʁə ʁeˈɡi̯oːn/
translations.en: I’m moving to another region soon.
translations.es: Pronto me mudo a otra región.
translations.fr: Je déménage bientôt dans une autre région.
translations.it: Presto mi trasferisco in un’altra regione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我很快要搬到另一个地区。
translations.yue: 我好快會搬去另一個地方。
translations.ru: Скоро я переезжаю в другой регион.
translations.pt: Em breve vou me mudar para outra região.
translations.vi: Tôi sắp chuyển đến một khu vực khác.
translations.nl: Ik verhuis binnenkort naar een andere regio.
translations.uk: Я скоро переїжджаю в інший регіон.
translations.hi: मैं जल्द ही किसी दूसरे इलाके में जा रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Wkrótce przeprowadzam się do innego regionu.
translations.nb: Snart flytter jeg til en annen region.
translations.id: Sebentar lagi saya pindah ke wilayah lain.
translations.sv: Jag flyttar snart till en annan region.
translations.ro: În curând mă mut într-o altă regiune.
translations.cs: Brzy se stěhuji do jiné oblasti.
translations.da: Jeg flytter snart til en anden region.
translations.ja: もうすぐ別の地域に引っ越します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Main verb, 1st person singular present; denotes moving (residence) and selects a destination PP.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Preposition indicating motion towards; governs accusative.
Indefinite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Region'.
Attributive adjective, accusative feminine singular; modifies 'Region'.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; object of the preposition 'in' (destination).

sentences.target: Die Region hat wirklich tolle Radwege.

translations.de: Die Region hat wirklich tolle Radwege.
translations.en: The region really has great bike paths.
translations.es: Esta región tiene carriles bici muy buenos.
translations.fr: Cette région a vraiment de super pistes cyclables.
translations.it: Questa regione ha davvero ottime piste ciclabili.
translations.ko: 이 지역은 자전거 도로가 정말 좋아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这片地区的自行车道真的很棒。
translations.yue: 呢個地區嘅單車徑真係好正。
translations.ru: В этом регионе действительно отличные велодорожки.
translations.pt: Esta região tem ciclovias muito boas.
translations.he: באזור הזה יש באמת שבילי אופניים מעולים.
translations.tr: Bu bölgede bisiklet yolları gerçekten harika.
translations.vi: Khu vực này có đường xe đạp rất tuyệt.
translations.ar: هذه المنطقة فيها مسارات دراجات ممتازة فعلًا.
translations.nl: Deze regio heeft echt geweldige fietspaden.
translations.uk: У цьому регіоні справді чудові велодоріжки.
translations.hu: Ebben a régióban tényleg szuper kerékpárutak vannak.
translations.hi: इस क्षेत्र में साइकिल पथ वाकई बहुत अच्छे हैं.
translations.pl: Ten region ma naprawdę świetne ścieżki rowerowe.
translations.el: Αυτή η περιοχή έχει πραγματικά εξαιρετικούς ποδηλατόδρομους.
translations.nb: Denne regionen har virkelig flotte sykkelveier.
translations.id: Wilayah ini punya jalur sepeda yang benar-benar bagus.
translations.sv: Den här regionen har verkligen jättebra cykelbanor.
translations.ro: Regiunea asta are piste de biciclete cu adevărat grozave.
translations.cs: Tahle oblast má opravdu skvělé cyklostezky.
translations.da: Denne region har virkelig gode cykelstier.
translations.fi: Tällä alueella on todella hyvät pyörätiet.
translations.ja: この地域には本当に素晴らしい自転車道があります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of 'Region'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a direct object.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'tolle'.
Attributive adjective, accusative plural (strong inflection), modifying 'Radwege'.
Common noun, masculine plural accusative; direct object of 'hat'.

sentences.target: Wir machen Urlaub in der Region.

translations.de: Wir machen Urlaub in der Region.
translations.es: Estamos de vacaciones en la región.
translations.fr: Nous sommes en vacances dans la région.
translations.ko: 우리는 그 지역에서 휴가를 보내고 있어요.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nghỉ mát ở khu vực này.
translations.ar: نحن نقضي عطلتنا في هذه المنطقة.
translations.nl: We zijn op vakantie in de regio.
translations.hi: हम इस क्षेत्र में छुट्टियाँ मना रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Jesteśmy na wakacjach w tym regionie.
translations.nb: Vi er på ferie i regionen.
translations.id: Kami sedang berlibur di wilayah ini.
translations.sv: Vi är på semester i regionen.
translations.ro: Suntem în vacanță în această regiune.
translations.ja: 私たちはこの地域で休暇を過ごしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Main verb, 1st person plural present; part of the collocation 'Urlaub machen' (to go on vacation).
Common noun, masculine singular accusative; direct object of 'machen'.
Preposition marking static location; governs dative.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Region'.
Common noun, feminine singular dative; object of the preposition 'in' (location).
